content:
Some achievements are more than just certificates—they remind us that every sacrifice, every sleepless night, every moment of self-doubt, and every hour of hard work was worth it.

It's been three months since I received my CMA Intermediate certificate and marksheet, and the feeling is still just as special.

Clearing both groups of CMA Intermediate in my very first attempt, with exemptions in 6 out of 8 papers, was once just a dream. There were difficult days and long nights, but believing in the process and staying consistent made all the difference.

Forever grateful to those who saw a winner in me long before I ever won. Their belief became my strength when mine was being tested.

This is not the destination—it's another meaningful step toward becoming a Cost & Management Accountant. Looking forward to the journey ahead with gratitude and determination.
comment: The next phase is where the certification turns into capability—applying costing concepts, business insights, and decision support in real situations will shape the professional journey ahead.
